name: app
description: Core routing directory using Next.js App Router. It manages authentication flows, administrative dashboards, and user-facing astrology services.

subfolders.name: (auth)
subfolders.description: Logical route group for authentication-related pages.

subfolders.name: actions
subfolders.description: Server actions for database persistence and financial transactions.

subfiles.name: kundli-actions.ts
subfiles.description: Handles token deduction and cross-database report mapping.

subfiles.name: report-actions.ts
subfiles.description: Unified backend service for cross-schema report metadata lookups and MongoDB data retrieval.

subfiles.name: page.tsx
subfiles.description: Login page component balancing social and email auth.

subfiles.name: page.tsx
subfiles.description: Handles session destruction and redirection to landing.

subfolders.name: (platform)
subfolders.description: Main platform sections for authenticated users.

subfiles.name: dashboard-client.tsx
subfiles.description: URL-synchronized dashboard orchestrator managing tab states and report selection via search parameters. Handles real-time tab switching and deep-linking support.

subfolders.name: pre-order
subfolders.description: Endpoints for managing pre-orders in MongoDB.

subfiles.name: route.ts
subfiles.description: Handles POST (save) and GET (list) for pre-orders.

subfolders.name: pre-order
subfolders.description: Public pre-order form with Google Form UI.

subfiles.name: page.tsx
subfiles.description: Interactive birth details form for Agent-1200 plan.

subfiles.name: page.tsx
subfiles.description: Table view of all MongoDB pre-orders.

subfolders.name: user-report
subfolders.description: Static and dynamic reports for users.

subfiles.name: layout.tsx
subfiles.description: The root layout with font and metadata configurations.

subfiles.name: page.tsx
subfiles.description: Landing page with HERO and features.
